title: Advanced Economics
description: Advanced Economics adds a full world-scoped economy for Fabric servers: shop and sell menus, money transfers, investments, professions, daily quests, money duels, gambling, paid teleports, XP trading, item services, loans, pet insurance, death insurance, c
body:
# Advanced Economics

Advanced Economics is a Fabric economy mod for Minecraft 26.1.2. It adds a world-based money system with shops, selling, item unlocks, quests, professions, investments, loans, paid services, gambling, and an in-game economy menu.

Each world has its own saved economy data, so player balances, investments, unlocks, quests, loans, professions, and history do not carry between worlds.

## Feedback
https://advanced-economics.canny.io/feedback

![Shop Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29ef2fbf792e334adcbbc082ae99603c60a96d7b.jpeg)

## Features

- Player wallet with `/money`
- Send money to other players with a sender fee
- Buy and sell supported items
- Item unlock system for shop progression
- Daily quests with money rewards
- Professions with sell bonuses and profession quests
- Investment deposits that grow over time
- Fixed-term deposits
- Emergency loans and repayments
- Money duels between players
- Item and money gambling
- Paid teleporting
- XP and money trading
- Item services, including repair, disenchant, and rename
- Player death insurance
- Pet selling and pet insurance
- Server feature toggles with `/aesettings`
- In-game economy GUI opened with `N` by default

## Commands

Use `/aehelp` in game to see the full command list and examples.

Creative-mode players can use `/aegivemoney <amount>` or `/aegivemoney <player> <amount>` to add money for testing.

## Configuration

Sell prices can be configured through the generated config file or overridden with datapacks. Buy prices are based on sell prices.

## Notes

This mod is intended for singleplayer worlds, LAN worlds, and Fabric servers that want a lightweight economy system without requiring external plugins.
